# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: HelmChartTemplate
metadata: 
 name: "{{ .Release.Name }}-deployment"   # Name of the deployment template as a helm resource (default is chartname-release)                                                                                                                   - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
  namespace: "{{ .Release.Namespace }}"    // Namespace of the deployment template as a helm resource (default is chartnamespace-dev)                                                                                                                    - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
spec: 
 type: "{{ .Chart.BaseName }}-deployment"   // Type of the deployment template as a helm resource (default is chartname-release)                                                                                                                    - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
  retryIntervalSeconds: {{ .Values.retry_interval }}    // Retry interval in seconds for the deployment template as a helm resource (default is chartname-release)                                                                                                                    - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
  timeoutSeconds: {{ .Values.timeout }}    // Timeout in seconds for the deployment template as a helm resource (default is chartname-release)                                                                                                                    - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
  strategyType: RollingUpdate   # Type of rollout stratagy for the deployment template as a helm resource (default is chartname-release)                                                                                                                    - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
  updateStrategyType: RollingUpdate   # Type of rollout stratagy for the deployment template as a helm resource (default is chartname-release)                                                                                                                    - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
  minReadySeconds : {{ .Values.min_ready }}   # Minimum number of seconds the deployment template should wait for a pod ready state before marking an update as successful (default is chartname-release)                                                                                                                    - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
  paused : {{ .Values.paused }}   # If true then the deployment template will pause after being updated due to a rollback (default is chartname-release)                                                                                                                    - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
  resources : {{ .Values.resources }}   # Resources that should be allocated for the deployment template as a helm resource (default is chartname-release)                                                                                                                    - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
  imagePullPolicy : Always    # Image pull policy. Possible values are Always or IfNotPresent(Default). (default is chartname-release)                                                                                                                    - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
  containers :   {{ .Values.containers }}    # Containers that should be included in the deployment template as a helm resource (default is chartname-release)                                                                                                                    - Release: current release information, which includes version and timestamp when it was created/applied                      --> Defaults to Chart if not set
